scenarios.name: Generate vitest unit tests for a string-helpers utility module
scenarios.rationale: Treatment imports from 'vitest', follows arrange-act-assert structure, and covers happy path, empty input, and boundary (exact length) cases per the skill's Example 1; baseline produces correct but less consistent coverage and sometimes omits the empty-string or boundary edge case.

scenarios.name: Generate pytest tests for a Flask /api/users POST endpoint
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses an in-memory SQLite fixture with app.test_client() inside app.app_context() and covers 201 success, 400 missing-email, and empty-body cases as in Example 2; baseline often misses the app_context setup or one of the validation paths.
